positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic celestial lion wearing a laurel crown, roaring against a deep indigo cosmic nebula background. The lion's silhouette is powerful and defined, composed of geometric celestial elements like moons and constellations, rendered in vibrant gold leaf and matte black ink. The composition should be centered and perfectly balanced, with radiating golden energy emanating outwards. Use Art Deco and neo-sacred geometry influences. High contrast, clean linework, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, perfect for a repeating pattern or single central apparel print. Wallpaper quality, vibrant and luxurious.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, ugly, cartoonish, photorealism, dirty, messy
